original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Aiden, Charlotte, Matthew, and Jack. Aiden said, "Jack is a knight or Charlotte is a knight." Charlotte commented, "Matthew is a knave if and only if Aiden is a knight". "Aiden is a knave," Matthew declared. Jack commented, "Charlotte is a knight or Charlotte is a knave". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
